title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 13–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Toko, Wano Citizens, Orochi, Luffy, Unknown person #14 as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Lady Komura- Sak!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Look this waaaay!!:o

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: A course- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oooohh!! She's so dazzling that I can't even look at her!!

dialogue.text: The dayu", Komura- Saki...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13

dialogue.text: I'm sorry that I'm late!! Ahaha!

dialogue.text: Hey, now.:) I was worried about you, toko.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's an emergency! We'll need about 20 stretches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Due to Lady Komurasaki passing through, multiple people have fallen un- conscious after losing too much blood or being blinded!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Under- stood.

dialogue.text: I'm going to be pretty busy for a while.

dialogue.text: Give Queen a Call!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 30 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
